visual_summary: A massive Martian industrial complex characterized by cavernous machinery and heavy industrial pumps. The facility features three great mechanical lock doors and is serviced by high-speed air-scout flight paths. The interior is defined by a sense of biological failure, containing deceased or dying workers within an oxygen-depleted environment.
layout_notes: Massive scale; includes three great mechanical doors (locks), heavy industrial pumps, and high-speed air-scout flight paths leading to the facility.
mood: Mechanical urgency contrasted with biological failure; desolate and oxygen-deprived.
constraints: Extreme oxygen deprivation must be visually or atmospherically represented.
Must maintain a sense of massive scale.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific internal layout beyond the doors and pumps is unstated.
